name: Elevate Fitness
tagline: Sonoma County's premier private training studio
seoDescription: Elevate Fitness is a private personal training studio in Santa Rosa offering NeuroKinetic Therapy, strength, yoga and nutrition coaching with founder Josh Mesa.

hero.heading: Customized training that ends pain and builds real strength
hero.subheading: Founder Josh Mesa pairs 11+ years of coaching with Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapy to fix imbalances, not just chase reps.

highlights: Founder is a Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapy specialist
Private one-on-one studio, not a crowded big-box gym
Training, NKT pain relief, yoga therapy & nutrition under one roof

images.heroAlt: Elevate Fitness in Santa Rosa, CA

about.heading: About Elevate Fitness
body: Elevate Fitness is a private training studio in Santa Rosa founded by Josh Mesa, who went full-time as a personal trainer in 2009 after watching family and friends struggle with pain and health conditions. He opened Elevate to break away from cookie-cutter programs and deliver a truly customized experience.

Josh is a Certified Personal Trainer, Corrective Exercise and Performance Enhancement specialist, and a Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapist. That blend lets him bridge injury rehab and athletic performance, helping clients break through plateaus, get out of pain, and stay active for the long run.

services.title: NeuroKinetic Therapy (Pain Relief)
services.description: Targets the nervous system and muscular imbalances to find the source of pain and correct it at the root.

services.title: NeuroKinetic Therapy (Strength & Athletes)
services.description: Bridges rehab and performance by retraining movement patterns to prevent injury and break through performance barriers.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one programs combining resistance training, cardio, mobility, nutrition, and expert instruction.

services.title: Group Training
services.description: Dynamic, community-focused workouts with expert coaching for all fitness levels.

services.title: Yoga Therapy
services.description: Mind-body sessions focused on stress reduction, balance, and injury prevention.

services.title: Nutrition Coaching
services.description: One-on-one and group guidance on macros, diet selection, and strategies to support your goals.

items.quote: Many thanks to Elevate Fitness. I had reached a major plateau and couldn't figure out what was next. Josh helped me break through and experience a new kind of workout. He also supported my son in rehabilitating his arm in preparation for college baseball
items.author: Elevate Fitness client

items.quote: I've been working with Josh since 2012. I've got a congenital back problem and he's helped me keep my active lifestyle, riding bikes and motorcycles. He's kept me functional, healthy and in good shape and out of pain. I recommend him highly.
items.author: Long-time client

items.quote: I'm a track sprinter and high jumper, and I've worked with Elevate Fitness since my senior year of high school. His belief in me and training helped me become a league champion, and now I'm running at the collegiate level.
items.author: Collegiate athlete

items.a: You'll find us at 3451 Airway Dr.
Hours can vary — give us a call at +17073326760 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17073326760 — we're glad to help.
